expectations.evidence: Title is 'Vector Databases: What They Are, How They Differ, and Which One to Choose for AI Applications' - descriptive and engaging
TL;DR section present at line 3 with substantive 3-sentence summary

Sections organized by theme: 'Why Traditional Databases Fall Short', 'The Major Vector Database Options', 'Choosing the Right Database', 'Indexing Algorithms', 'Embedding Models Matter More' - not chronological
Key Takeaways section present with 8 bullet points
Pinecone, Weaviate, ChromaDB, pgvector all have dedicated subsections
HNSW explained in 'Underappreciated Role of Indexing Algorithms' section
Dedicated section 'Embedding Models Matter More Than the Database' with bold emphasis
Proper markdown with H1, H2, H3 headers, bold text, bullet lists
